features_demoed.description: End-to-end automated status mail generation from workspace state with PM review step
Converts meeting transcripts into structured meeting records, decision logs, and action items
Detects requirement changes and generates impact assessments with replan recommendations

key_learnings: PMs want to see source evidence links inline during review, not just in metadata
Weekly cadence is preferred over bi-weekly for team-level updates

feedback_items.feedback: Add option to customize the status mail subject line template
The demo flow was clear and well-structured

next_sprint_focus: Complete chore automation agent with learning model
Build customer intelligence signal aggregation workflow
Prototype PM cockpit first-screen information architecture
